Symfony Polyfill / Intl: Idn ============================ This component provides [`idn_to_ascii`](https://php.net/idn-to-ascii) and [`idn_to_utf8`](https://php.net/idn-to-utf8) functions to users who run php versions without the [Intl](https://php.net/intl) extension. More information can be found in the [main Polyfill README](https://github.com/symfony/polyfill/blob/main/README.md). License ======= This library is released under the [MIT license](LICENSE).
